creator: fullermd@over-yonder.net
text:
Hm, the mismatch probably means LP's tarball generation isn't as deterministic as I thought it was   :|  I'll look into it, maybe just have to pregen and host the tarball.  May take me a couple days to get a chance.

As for the version, I suspect you were looking at devel/b*rz* (which _is_ at 3.0.1, of a related but not the same program), not devel/b*zr* which is 2.7.0.
